payload.answer: Acknowledged setup: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is the strict memory intake agent. Open questions to resolve later: should Telegram be added; which model offers cheapest cost while saturating performance. Maintain ambiguity where decisions are not yet finalized; do not present superseded facts as current.
payload.decision: establish_brain_db_as_source_of_truth; treat Cognee as rebuildable projection; Slack as strict memory intake agent; consider Telegram addition later; optimize cost-performance by model selection; preserve ambiguity; avoid superseding facts

entity_resolution.reason: No explicit entity resolutions requested; statements refer to roles and system components rather than individual entities needing resolution.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain.
Slack acts as a strict memory intake agent.

repair_options: Add Telegram as a potential future integration with a staged evaluation plan.
Run a cost-per-performance analysis across candidate models to identify the cheapest option that saturates performance.
Establish a versioned snapshot mechanism to prevent regression when updating memory entries.
